description: The most famous hyperbolic triangle group — generates {7,3} and {3,7} tilings

r1.description: Reflection across the geodesic opposite the π/2 vertex (the arc PQ)

r2.description: Reflection across the geodesic opposite the π/3 vertex (the x-axis leg OP)
r2.geometricRole: interior symmetry, within a fundamental domain's tile

r3.description: Reflection across the geodesic opposite the π/7 vertex (the y-axis leg OQ)
r3.geometricRole: interior symmetry, within a fundamental domain's tile

S = r2·r1.description: Elliptic rotation of order 3 about the q-vertex (π/3 angle vertex)

T = r3·r1.description: Elliptic rotation of order 7 about the p-vertex (π/7 angle vertex)

signature.note: This is related to the Hurwitz group: max 84(g-1) automorphisms for genus g surface
signature.hurwitzConnection: The quotient of the (2,3,7) group by a torsion-free normal subgroup of index 168 gives the Klein quartic of genus 3

kleinQuartic.description: The Klein quartic x³y + y³z + z⁴ = 0 has 168 automorphisms, the maximum for genus 3
kleinQuartic.tilingRelation: {7,3} tiling of the Klein quartic has 24 heptagons, 56 vertices, 84 edges

cayleyGraph.structure: Infinite 3-valent tree (Cayley graph of the free product ℤ₂*ℤ₂*ℤ₂ quotiented by the triangle relations)
